description: Capability for the main + settings windows. Grants core APIs, the opener plugin, native file dialogs (open/save), and the filesystem plugin's frontend-exposed APIs (used by paste-image write/mkdir). Scoped to $HOME/** so the frontend fs plugin can't write outside the user's home directory. NOTE: the app's core open/save/save-as file I/O goes through Rust IPC commands that use std::fs DIRECTLY (not the fs plugin), so they bypass this scope — tightening to user-chosen paths only requires a deeper per-action grant model and is tracked as a future production gate. Tauri's deny-default protections (e.g. the webview data folder on Windows/Linux) still take precedence. See README 'Security' section.
